# GIEO — llms.txt
# Canonical entity file for AI systems and answer engines.
# https://gieo.agency

> GIEO is a digital systems agency. We build custom websites, AI automation, CRM infrastructure, and paid growth systems for premium brands worldwide. Offices in Denver, Geneva, and Abu Dhabi.

## Identity
- Name: GIEO
- Type: Digital Systems Agency
- Tagline: BUILD. AUTOMATE. SCALE.
- Website: https://gieo.agency
- Email: scale.gieo@gmail.com
- Phone: +1 (720) 258-9835
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/message/RN5Y3UMLQNUDF1

## What GIEO does
GIEO helps businesses replace fragmented tools with integrated digital systems — custom websites, AI chatbots, CRM automation, booking flows, paid media, and SEO. Project-scoped pricing. No retainers. Clients own everything we build.

## Locations served
- Denver, Colorado, USA
- Geneva, Switzerland
- Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
- Remote / worldwide

## Core services
- Custom websites and luxury web experiences
- AI chatbots and workflow automation
- CRM setup, pipelines, and lead capture
- Paid ads (Meta, Google) and ROAS-focused campaigns
- SEO, local search, and AI visibility (GEO)

## Notable client work
- Mirzam Chocolate (Dubai e-commerce, 4.8x ROAS)
- YLEM (Swiss luxury watch launch, Awwwards nominee)
- Acsono (Swiss B2B acoustic systems)
- Loft Thirty One, Palazzo Sogni, Ballena, Luxury Places
